LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DISCOVER BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT CONNIE CHAMPAGNE IN THE AMOUNT OF $7567.39 INCLUSIVE OF COSTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff Discover Bank's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Discover Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Connie Champagne in the amount of $7567.39 inclusive of costs.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
